{{CargoOrgan
|name=Razor Horn
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10655
|idx=12
|description=Inscribed rule: When in doubt, choose the pointy one, so you can earn more points in a test.
|skill=Summon a Sharp Horn, dealing DMG equal to 154% of ATK!
|hp=1010
|def=71
|atk=84
|rush=161
|gene1=In explorations, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +2%
|gene2=In explorations, {race} RUSH +20
|gene3=In explorations, Ignore DEF +1%
|gene7=In explorations, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +2% (Awakened)
|}}
